title: Supabase auth plugin not configured
symptom: When attempting to connect Supabase auth, the user sees a message indicating that the auth plugin is not configured.
applies_when: Trying to set up Supabase auth
Supabase is not connected as a data source
not_this_if: Supabase is already connected as a data source
root_cause: The Supabase auth plugin requires that Supabase is connected as a data source before the auth flows can be configured. If this prerequisite is not met, the plugin will not function correctly.
fix_steps: Connect Supabase as a data source in your project
Proceed to set up the Supabase auth flows
agent_instruction: Ensure Supabase is connected as a data source before configuring the auth plugin.
